_publications._publicationTitle: Recommendations for assessing appearance concerns related to plexiform and cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis 1 clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: conducted rigorous qualitative research to develop the content...in a large sample of 1,495 participants, including 31 with NF1 (2.9%)...lack of use and normative data in older adults (>29 years), no published information...regarding sensitivity to change
details: Developed in large sample of 1,495 participants including 31 with NF1 (2.9%), but lacks normative data in older adults >29 years and no published sensitivity to change information
